title: More Strait talks: Trump rolls out 'Project Freedom' to guide ships through Hormuz
summary_full: US President Donald Trump launched 'Project Freedom' to aid commercial ships stranded in the Strait of Hormuz, citing humanitarian concerns and low supplies.  He stated the US will guide vessels safely out, emphasizing these ships belong to nations uninvolved in regional disputes. Trump also revealed positive discussions with Iran, though he rejected their latest proposal for conflict resolution.
